series_metadata.series_title: Voter Registration & Absentee Ballot Application Copies and Related Correspondence
series_metadata.series_description: Copies of voter registration forms or absentee ballot applications and related correspondence received from county boards of elections or other states and kept for administrative purposes.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then may destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then may destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
